definition:
1. to aim  or shoot at , with genitive, τοῦ σκοποῦ (Plato Philosophus), etc. 
2. metaphorically to aim at, endeavour after , (Plato Philosophus); στ. φίλων κριτῶν to aim at having  friends as judges, (Xenophon Historicus) 
3. to endeavour to make out, to guess  at a thing, with genitive, (Isocrates Orator):—; absolute to make guesses, conjecture, (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
